results.snippet: What Does a Cloud Engineer Cost in India with F5 Hiring Solutions? results.snippet: How much does it really cost to run a GCC in India vs keeping the team onshore in the US? Ans: A mature GCC in India costs 65–74% less than a comparable US onshore team when you include salary, benefits, taxes, office, turnover, and recruitment.
